scripts.copy-html: mkdir -p dist/nodes/switchbot-config dist/nodes/switchbot-status dist/nodes/switchbot-command && cp src/nodes/switchbot-config/switchbot-config.html dist/nodes/switchbot-config/ && cp src/nodes/switchbot-status/switchbot-status.html dist/nodes/switchbot-status/ && cp src/nodes/switchbot-status/switchbot-status-ui.js dist/nodes/switchbot-status/ && cp src/nodes/switchbot-command/switchbot-command.html dist/nodes/switchbot-command/ && cp src/nodes/switchbot-command/switchbot-command-ui.js dist/nodes/switchbot-command/
